name: crawlbase-mcp
description: Crawlbase Web MCP Server (Model Context Protocol) connects AI agents and large language models (LLMs) with real-time web data. Built on Crawlbase’s proven web scraping and crawling infrastructure, it handles JavaScript rendering, anti-bot protection, and web data extraction at scale — powering Claude, Cursor, and Windsurf. It delivers a reliable, production-ready pipeline of live, structured data for AI workflows and intelligent applications.
